pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 31, creates directory and subdirectories at this path
docker-compose.yml generated by setup_task.sh lines 119-157 defines all four services
docker-compose.yml service definitions and confirmed in setup_task.sh line 28 cleanup
export_result.sh line 46 checks this exact file path; setup_task.sh line 198 task description mentions saving here
verifier.py line 120 implements scoring with 'passed = score >= 60'; docstring line 13 confirms 60 point threshold

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Docker health check configuration exercise using a synthetic 4-service application stack created dynamically at /home/ga/projects/healthcheck-lab. Services are: product-catalog (Node.js, port 3000, /healthz), order-service (Python Flask, port 5000, /health), db (PostgreSQL 14), and cache (Redis 7-alpine). Container names are healthlab-catalog, healthlab-orders, healthlab-db, healthlab-cache. The task verifier scores agents on health check configuration (80 points for services, 10 for restart policies, 10 for evidence file) with a 60-point pass threshold. Evidence is saved to /home/ga/Desktop/health_status.txt.
